title: Touch Grass or Die
description: Keep touching grass, or you will die! 不摸草就死，就是那麼殘酷。🗣️🥀
body:
**這是我花67年做的資料包。在這資料包裡面，你必須不停的摸草，否則就會被大自然制裁。**

●新增摸草值，初始為100，會持續下降，歸0就會死

●死亡後摸草值會回到50

●踩到草地上或打草可以增加摸草值

●詳細內容可以看我的影片介紹。祝你摸草愉快。🥀


**This is a datapack I spent 67 years creating. In this datapack, you must constantly touch grass—otherwise, nature will punish you.**

● A new “Touch Grass” value has been added. It starts at 100 and continuously decreases. If it reaches 0, you die.

● After death, your Touch Grass value resets to 50.

● Stepping on grass blocks or breaking grass will increase your Touch Grass value.

● When breaking short grass or tall grass, there is a 0.6% chance to break “Legendary Grass” (it has no effect and is purely for emotional value).

Enjoy touching grass!
